CustomField.description: The date the applicant has to provide explanations for their unreported deposits. Autofills from the most recently set Unreported Deposit Deadline on an applicant's Unreported Deposit Income Source.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The date the applicant has to provide explanations for their unreported deposits. Autofills from the most recently set Unreported Deposit Deadline on an applicant's Unreported Deposit Income Source.
CustomField.label: Unreported Deposit Deadline
